ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., user, admin, moderator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* User's bio */,
  "location" TEXT /* User's location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of content */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the content */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of content (e.g., movie, TV show) */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the content */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year of release */,
  "director" TEXT /* Director of the content */,
  "cast" TEXT /* Cast of the content */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the content in minutes */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the content */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the content */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the content was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the content was last updated */,
  "imdb_id" TEXT /* IMDB ID of the content */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL of the content's poster */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the tag */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content the tag is associated with */,
  "tag" TEXT /* The tag itself */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was added */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Whether the tag is public or private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_tags_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_tags_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content the review is associated with */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was written */,
  "edited_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was last edited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content the rating is associated with */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre association */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content the genre is associated with */,
  "genre" TEXT /* The genre of the content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_genres_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_actors" (
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor association */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content the actor is associated with */,
  "actor_name" TEXT /* The name of the actor */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* The name of the character played by the actor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_actors_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., new tag, new review) */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content the notification is related to */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was sent */,
  "read_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moderation_queue" (
  "queue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item in the queue */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the item */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content the item is associated with */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of item (e.g., tag, review, rating) */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the item (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the item was added to the queue */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("queue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderation_queue_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderation_queue_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moderation_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "moderator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the moderator who took the action */,
  "queue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item in the moderation queue */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken (e.g., approve, reject) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the action */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderation_logs_moderator_id FOREIGN KEY ("moderator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderation_logs_queue_id FOREIGN KEY ("queue_id") REFERENCES moderation_queue ("queue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_favorites" (
  "favorite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each favorite entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who marked the content as a favorite */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content marked as a favorite */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the content was marked as a favorite */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("favorite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_favorites_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_favorites_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_watched_content" (
  "watch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watched content entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who watched the content */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content watched */,
  "watch_date" TEXT /* Date when the content was watched */,
  "watch_duration" INTEGER /* Duration in minutes the content was watched */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_watched_content_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_watched_content_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_search_history" (
  "search_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the search */,
  "search_query" TEXT /* The search query used */,
  "search_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the search was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("search_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_search_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_friends" (
  "friend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each friend relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "friend_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the friend */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the relationship (e.g., pending, accepted) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("friend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_friends_friend_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("friend_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_friends_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "preference_type" TEXT /* Type of preference (e.g., notification settings, content filters) */,
  "preference_value" TEXT /* Value of the preference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_ratings" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the content */,
  "rating_count" INTEGER /* Number of ratings for the content */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ratings were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_similarities" (
  "similarity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each similar content entry */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content */,
  "similar_content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the similar content */,
  "similarity_score" REAL /* Similarity score between the two content pieces */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("similarity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_similarities_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_similarities_similar_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("similar_content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award entry */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content that won the award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was won */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nominations" (
  "nomination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nomination entry */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content that received the nomination */,
  "nomination_name" TEXT /* Name of the nomination */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the nomination was received */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the nomination */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nomination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nominations_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)
